description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that includes the external configuration files /.gitlab-ci-default-runners.yml and /.gitlab-ci-main.yml. Define three CI variables: AUTOBUILD_SKIP_SAMBA_O3 set to '0', SAMBA_CI_AUTOBUILD_ENABLE_COVERAGE left empty, and SAMBA_CI_FLAVOR set to default. No jobs, stages, or other settings are declared directly in this file; they are expected to be provided by the included templates.
